trigger: First time player encounters Core Guardians

lines.speaker: Celestial-Throne
lines.text: We predate your wars. We will postdate your extinction.

lines.speaker: Celestial-Throne
lines.text: You have found us because we permitted it. Consider carefully what that implies about your intelligence operations.

trigger: Player has controlled territory adjacent to Guardians for 10 cycles

lines.speaker: Celestial-Throne
lines.text: Every civilization believes itself the final one. You are not the first to be wrong.

lines.speaker: Celestial-Throne
lines.text: We have watched fourteen extinction events from this position. We are still here. The fourteen are not. This is relevant data.

trigger: Player initiates diplomacy with Core Guardians

lines.speaker: Celestial-Throne
lines.text: We do not fight for territory. We fight to preserve what the galaxy will need when the noise ends.

lines.speaker: Celestial-Throne
lines.text: You wish to ally with us. Curious. You are temporary. But you are resisting the Vorax, which makes you briefly useful. We will consider the arrangement.

lines.speaker: Celestial-Throne
lines.text: You call us gods. We call you temporary.

lines.speaker: Celestial-Throne
lines.text: The Vorax have entered the inner systems. This was the condition under which we agreed to intervene directly. We suggest you not stand between us and them.
